mentions.note: Cancer vaccination promise long-awaited; stock up 54% YTD; Cramer wants to wait and see how certain clinical data is before buying despite good intentions.

#2 January performer, up ~50%; had wild ride (crashed 95% from 2021 peak to Nov lows). Returning to revenue growth 2026 first time since 2021. Pursuing personalized cancer vaccines. Still unprofitable but improved trajectory.
Hottest stock this year; buzzing on personal cancer vaccines; hope they happen but been expecting since IPO 7 years ago; reports Friday.

Vaccine player up 72% Q1 (rank #6); escaped pandemic wilderness, settling lawsuits overhang, flu vaccine FDA review, Dr. Vinay Prasad (vaccine skeptic) departing FDA end of month—major positive catalyst for primarily vaccine company.
